titleStmt.title: SII 26.671: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 671. (A.R. No. 629 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places.
It contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Tirumagaḷpōlapperunilachchelviyum, etc.

It records the gift of one nandā lamp and 20 kāśu to provide for burning the same in the temple of the god Tirunallam-uḍaiya-mahādēvar of Tirunallam, a Braham dēyam in Veṇṇāḍu in Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu, by a certain Āritan Paramēśvaran of the same place. The gift seems to have been accepted by Śāttaṉakkaṉ, Śāttaṉ Tāyan, Kaviśiyaṉ Tarkkaṉ Nārāyaṇaṉ, Kaviśiya Nakkaṉ Muṉnūṟṟuvaṉ, Māḍilaṉ Muṉnūṟṟuvaṉ and some others whose names are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷpolap perunilaccelviyun=taṉakke Urimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kān=taḷūrccālaik
kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyu nuḷampapāṭiyun=taṭikai vaḻiyuṅ kuṭamalai nāṭuṅ kol
lamuṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtaru Īḻamaṇṭalamum Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamu
m tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟittaṇṭāl koṇṭu taṉneḻil vaḷar Ūḻiyuḷellāyāṇṭum toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarai tecuko
ḷ śrīkovirājarājakesarivanmar śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 7 vatu Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu brahmadeyam tirunallattu
Āritan parameśvaran tirunallam Uṭaiya mahādevarkku vaiytta tirunontāviḷakku 1 kācu 2 10 Ikkācu Irupatu
m koṇṭu Erikkakaṭava cāttaṉakkanum cāttaṉ tāyanum kaviciyaṉ tarkka
ṉ nārāyaṇanum kaviciyanakkaṉ muṉnūṟṟuvanum
māṭilaṉ muṉnūṟṟuvaṉ Ivvaṉaivom śrīkoyilu pakkal
kkaṭavomākavum Itu pā Iva viḷakku 1 Itu panmāyecura rakṣai—
Digital edition of SII 26.671 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
